message:
Command `
echo "=== Synthesis $(date) ==="
ps aux | grep -E "(librelane|yosys|openroad|abc)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CMD:"$11,"CPU:"$3"%","TIME:"$10}'
echo ""
tail -8 /tmp/librelane_synth2.log 2>/dev/null
echo ""
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -5
[ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no final"
# Check step 77 for synthesis outputs
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/77-yosys-synthesis/" 2>/dev/null | head -15
` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "

ps aux | grep -E "(librelane|yosys|openroad|abc)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CMD:"$11,"CPU:"$3"%","TIME:"$10}'
echo ""
tail -8 /tmp/librelane_synth2.log 2>/dev/null
echo ""
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -5
[ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no final"
# Check step 77 for synthesis outputs
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/77-yosys-synthesis/" 2>/dev/null | head -15
", "timeout": 15}

extras.command:
echo "=== Synthesis $(date) ==="
ps aux | grep -E "(librelane|yosys|openroad|abc)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CMD:"$11,"CPU:"$3"%","TIME:"$10}'
echo ""
tail -8 /tmp/librelane_synth2.log 2>/dev/null
echo ""
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -5
[ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no final"
# Check step 77 for synthesis outputs
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/77-yosys-synthesis/" 2>/dev/null | head -15
